meta.name: FC United mirror — mdStrikers site design (reference)
meta.purpose: High-level creative-direction spec for AI and developers to replicate the soccer-club marketing site look: dark cinematic hero, athletic typography, red accent, data-dense sports modules, and editorial commerce blocks.

brandEssence.visualMetaphor: Night match under lights: deep navy fields, white type, one sharp red signal for action and emphasis.
brandEssence.tone: Confident, athletic, slightly aggressive; not playful or soft. Copy blocks are short; UI favors scannability over prose.

designPrinciples.guidance: Alternate full-bleed dark sections (#081224 / #262f3e) with clean white content bands. Never float gray boxes on gray—use white breaks or photographic full-bleed.
Pure red (#ff0000) is the only saturated accent for links, hover, and primary CTAs. Supporting accents (green/gold) exist in theme tokens but should be used sparingly so red stays dominant.
Tight, tall display headlines (Bebas Neue class) for hero and section titles; rounded geometric sans (Poppins) for UI, body, and menus. Do not use one font for everything.
Section intros use a small uppercase subtitle (e.g. WELCOME, RESULTS), then a large display title, then one short paragraph or widget. This rhythm repeats down the page.
Prefer short fades (fadeIn, fadeInLeft/Right) with 150–400ms stagger. Parallax on hero is subtle (layered PNGs over photo). Avoid bouncy or playful animation.
Match blocks, league tables, and countdowns use compact tables, team crests, and monospace-like numeric emphasis—not cards with heavy shadows.

pageShell.description: Fullscreen-width layout (body_style_fullscreen) with custom transparent header over first viewport; main content is a stack of Elementor sections, not a centered card app.

maxWidthPx.notes: Use max-w-[1308px] or ~82rem with horizontal padding for parity.

horizontalPadding.desktopPx: 40–55 on key hero rows; inner columns sometimes 30

verticalRhythm.sectionSpacersPx: Common spacer heights: 22, 50, 56, 67, 110, 210 between major blocks; footer uses ~72–84px top air.
verticalRhythm.pattern: Large vertical gaps sell 'arena' scale; tighten only inside widgets (tables, cards).

gridBehavior.heroSplit: Roughly 76/24 or 52/48 splits for headline vs countdown; stacks on small screens.
gridBehavior.featureColumns: 3- and 4-column grids for news, products, and squad; gap via extended column gap (theme uses elementor-column-gap-extended).
gridBehavior.footer: Three equal columns for CTA band; below that 50/50 menu vs copyright.

usageNotes: scheme_default: light backgrounds with slate headings and muted body.
scheme_dark: used for header-over-hero, mobile fullscreen menu, and footer—white headings, muted body, red hover.
Avoid rainbow UI: Elementor kit lists many globals; for replication, anchor to navy + white + red.

display.name: Bebas Neue
display.role: Hero words, section titles, marketing headlines—uppercase feel, very tight line height.

ui.name: Poppins
ui.role: Body, navigation, buttons, form text, breadcrumbs.

data.name: Roboto
data.role: SportPress tables, some Elementor text widgets; pair with Roboto Slab only if needed for pull quotes (secondary).

scale.heroTitle: Extra large display; allow manual line breaks for drama (e.g. 'Soccer club' / 'United').
scale.sectionSubtitle: Small, uppercase, letterspaced (theme class sc_item_subtitle)—visually half the weight of the main title.
scale.body: 16px base on sports pages; 14px on dense footer or mobile tweaks.
scale.widgetTitle: h5-sized labels for widgets like NEXT MATCH, shop section labels.

rules: Headlines on dark: white; never mid-gray on navy for primary titles.
Links: default inherit heading/body; hover to #ff0000 on dark and light schemes.
Avoid serif body text; keep slab/serif out of data tables.

borderRadius.buttons: Theme buttons are relatively pill-like or softly rounded; tribe/events example uses ~30–35px radius for search—prefer large radius for primary actions when matching Events plugin styling.
borderRadius.cards: 3px on some dark panels (team page); default cards are mostly square with image ratio driving shape.

iconography.sets: Fontello / trx_addons icons for cart, user, search, menu; Font Awesome 5/4 shims loaded—use simple line icons, not filled emoji-style.
iconography.size: Header icons align to text baseline; mobile burger inherits header contrast.

elevationAndTexture.shadows: Minimal on sports tables; soft global presets exist in WP but marketing sections rely on flat color blocks and photography.

imagery.hero: Full-width photo (stadium/abstract) with additional parallax PNG layers for depth.
imagery.content: Editorial 16:9 and 4:3 thumbnails; WooCommerce catalog uses tall product crops on light ground.
imagery.partnerStrip: Horizontal swiper of sponsor artboards (~140px height), neutral background, many logos in a row.

siteHeader.structure: Fixed row: logo left (max-height ~80px desktop, ~55px compact), primary nav center/left cluster, right cluster: search field, shopping cart with count, user/login icon, mobile burger.
siteHeader.style: Transparent/dark scheme over hero; menu_hover_fade; horizontal dropdowns for deep IA.
siteHeader.behavior: Fullscreen mobile menu (scheme_dark) with logo top, accordion nav, search repeat, social row (X, Facebook, Pinterest icons).

hero.structure: Full viewport height section, align content toward bottom; optional news ticker line in upper-right on large screens; main column: subtitle + display title + one paragraph + primary button; opposing column: countdown or featured match widget.
hero.background: #081224 plus background-size cover image; optional mouse parallax decorative layers.
hero.cta: Primary button 'Read More' style (solid, high contrast); secondary actions appear as text links less often.

sectionHeader.pattern: sc_title: sc_item_subtitle (uppercase label) + sc_item_title (display) optional sc_item_descr paragraph; align left or center per section.
sectionHeader.alignment: Some blocks use title-self-right modifier for asymmetry.

primary.labelCase: Title Case for marketing ('Read More', 'View All Products')
primary.hover: Transition all 0.3s ease (theme default for links/buttons)

buttons.secondary: Outline or text-only is rare; prefer solid primary on white sections.
buttons.destructive: Not emphasized; sports theme avoids soft pastels for main CTAs.

newsAndBlog.newsLine: Compact list: title + date meta only—no excerpt in ticker layout.
newsAndBlog.gridCards: Image top, category/tags, title; hover states on image minimal (hover_none class on some blocks).

sportsWidgets.eventBlock: Single row: crests, date link, score in bold with winning side class, league + season meta, event title.
sportsWidgets.countdown: Label NEXT MATCH + opponent line + large numeric countdown (days/hrs/mins/secs) + team logos flanking event name.
sportsWidgets.leagueTable: Full-width responsive table; prioritize readability over zebra styling.
sportsWidgets.playerGrid: Portrait photos with number, name, position; uniform aspect (~3:4).

commerce.productGrid: 4 columns desktop: thumbnail, product tag pill, title link, price, 'Buy now' button in add_to_cart_wrap.
commerce.filters: Standard WooCommerce patterns; keep product imagery on white/light gray.

footer.structure: Top: three columns—headline ('Sign Up Now'), supporting copy, optional shortcode/newsletter placeholder; horizontal divider (2px, dark); row: secondary menu left, copyright right; generous spacer blocks.
footer.style: scheme_dark; divider color matches slate (#262f3e); text-editor links inherit hover red.

misc.scrollToTop: Floating anchor with icon-up—small round control, bottom-right.
misc.dividers: Elementor divider widget: solid line, full width, subtle padding vertical.
misc.forms: Contact Form 7 generic styles; prefer simple single-column fields with clear labels.

behaviors: Reduce hero top spacer (280px → 150px → 100px) and side padding.
Stack multi-column sports widgets; add vertical margin between stacked team columns (~20–30px).
Hide decorative news ticker on smallest breakpoints; show shorter logo variant.
Footer columns collapse with adjusted padding (30px → 10px → 0).

aiReplicationChecklist: Set page background to #F4F4F4 or white; only heroes/footers use deep navy/slate.
Use Bebas Neue (or similar condensed display) for hero and section titles; Poppins for everything else.
Keep one red accent for hovers and primary buttons.
Maintain 1308px max width for boxed sections with 40–55px side padding on desktop.
Use large vertical spacers between sections (50–110px) to match the 'stadium' layout.
Sports blocks: crests + numerals + tables before considering cards.
Header: transparent dark over first section; sticky/fixed feel with icons on the right.
Footer: dark slate, 3-column CTA, divider, then menu + copyright.
Motion: fade/slide reveals only; 300ms transitions on interactive elements.
Imagery: wide cinematic photos; product shots clean and isolated.
